items.title: Mobile token system (porcelain register v2, light+dark, tokens.ts + NativeWind vars)
items.acceptance: All app values trace to tokens; oxblood exact; contrast math recorded
items.evidence: src/theme/tokens.ts with computed contrast receipts (oxblood/white 9.7:1, dark 8.1:1, muted 6.0/6.1:1); tsc exit 0; expo export green

items.title: Break web oxblood alias to real #7A2733 family
items.acceptance: --cp-oxblood no longer aliases burnt-orange in both token files
items.evidence: commonplace-tokens.css + commonplace-tokens-neutral.css define #7A2733/#8A3140/#66202B + washes; zero component-level consumers (grep)

items.title: Nav shell: tab pill + detached right FAB 56pt, blur bar
items.acceptance: 4 tabs + thumb-zone FAB; iOS blur / Android tint fallback
items.evidence: TabBarWithFab.tsx; compiles into iOS bundle; no simulator on this machine (CLT only)

items.title: Omnibar sheet: Keep default + Ask chip arming + paste detection
items.acceptance: Plain submit = Keep offline; Ask explicit only; long-press FAB = voice
items.evidence: Omnibar.tsx: Keep default verb, Ask arms + never auto-routes (soft highlight only), clipboard offer, voice long-press

items.title: Capture trust loop: SQLite queue + state machine + receipts
items.acceptance: Airplane capture survives kill; drains on reconnect; receipt tappable
items.evidence: capture/queue.ts: durable-write-before-network, kept->syncing->filed/answered, retry pump; airplane-mode acceptance needs a device

items.title: GraphQL client + instance seam (probe, secure settings)
items.evidence: api/instance.ts ports web probe pattern ({ __typename } + x-api-key) to expo-secure-store; tsc/export green

items.title: Index tab: three bands + swipes + On-this-phone + Needs-your-call
items.acceptance: organize+briefing objects via kind renderers; zero badges
items.evidence: (tabs)/index.tsx: organize+briefing+items queries, swipe done/park/refile, needs-you card, no numeric badges anywhere

items.title: commonplace-api: remind_at_ms + NL date parse + edit_item status/due/remind
items.acceptance: cargo test green; ingest echoes reminder parse
items.evidence: crates/commonplace 31 tests + apps/commonplace-api 36 tests green incl. pt008 acceptance; clippy clean (2 proven-pre-existing block_view warnings excepted)

items.title: Chat tab: threads + composer + theoremAgent + scene WebView
items.acceptance: Text first; scene card opens WebView; failure leaves text
items.evidence: chat.tsx + thread/[id].tsx: text renders first, scene is an explicit affordance, WebView failure isolated in scene.tsx

items.title: Commonplaces tab: room list + feed + SSE + composer + approval cards
items.acceptance: Message round-trips via SSE; approve/deny cards; LAN node works
items.evidence: commonplaces.tsx + room/[id].tsx over the new GET /harness/rooms + SSE stream; approval cards wired to respondToApproval

items.title: harness-server: rooms list route + Expo push relay
items.acceptance: cargo test green; list returns rooms; push sends on mention
items.evidence: Theorem worktree: 37+3 server tests + 35 runtime tests green, clippy -D warnings clean, mock-server push test; live exp.host send env-gated by design (THEOREM_PUSH_ENABLED)

items.title: Data tab: Objects/Files/Timeline/Graph lenses + object drawer
items.acceptance: Any object opens same drawer; graph lens renders scene
items.evidence: (tabs)/data.tsx four lenses + object/[id].tsx drawer (provenance, destination tokens, receipts, composer)

items.title: Reminders + notification ethics (local schedule, categories, no badge)
items.acceptance: NL reminder fires deep-linked; resurfacing never notifies
items.evidence: notifications/index.ts is the only expo-notifications importer; 4 allowed kinds; shouldSetBadge:false; categories approve/deny + snooze/done; deep links wired in root layout

items.title: Accounts/avatar sheet: instance switcher, secure tokens, sign-out gate
items.acceptance: cloud<->local switch; tokens survive restart; queue drain gate
items.evidence: account.tsx: mode toggle, probe, secure-store persistence, drain-or-discard sign-out Alert

items.title: Share sheet via expo-share-intent -> pre-filled omnibar
items.acceptance: Shared URL lands in composer, capture confirmed
items.evidence: app.json plugin config + ShareIntentBridge in root layout; share extension requires a dev build to exercise

items.title: WeaveSpinner RN port on machine surfaces
items.acceptance: Reanimated 4 CSS animations; reduced-motion static fallback
items.evidence: components/WeaveSpinner.tsx compiles into the Hermes bundle; used on thread pending + room loading + scene loading; reduced-motion static node

items.title: Blob capture seam: multipart route + camera/file/voice wiring
items.acceptance: Photo queues offline, files with blob hash; voice files as audio
items.evidence: POST /ingest/blob + GET /blob/{hash} with 3 acceptance tests; client uploadBlobCapture wired for camera/file/voice; voice transcription deferred (no transcription service exists server-side)

items.title: Verification + docs both repos
items.acceptance: tsc + expo export + targeted tests green; records updated
items.evidence: tsc exit 0; expo export iOS green (4.6MB hbc); Rust suites green both repos; record 004 + READMEs + root scripts updated
